data.title: 国际服数位周边「Magical Girl Heavy Caliber Update: Celebrate with Digital Merch!」
data.summary: Suzumi (Magical) and Reisa (Magical), perfectly transformed into Thermite White and Thermite Pink, a
data.body:
Suzumi (Magical) and Reisa (Magical), perfectly transformed into Thermite White and Thermite Pink, are here with digital goods!  

Set the special digital goods prepared to celebrate the 'Magical Girl Heavy Caliber' update as your wallpaper and give Sensei's device a magical makeover!  

➡️ Learn More: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3398842

#BlueArchive
